title: Survival Essencials
description: This Modpack adds everything you need to play survival clean and simple.
body:
# SURVIVAL ESSENCIALS
A survival clean and simple Minecraft modpack
## Small Guide
Once you download and start the pack, do the standart minecraft setup, for example, FOV change and Resolution Fix. Then, go to the Recourse Pack menu and select the following recourse packs:
![Recourse Pack Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab7fbcff2c443c4e81c077f5c3d11c27f32fe12b_0.webp)
After that just start playing and have fun !!! 😎
## Features
- 🍖 **Saturation** - Levels of food saturation will be displayed on the hunger bar
- 🔨 **Durability** - Extra durability information will be displayed on items
- 🔦 **Visibilty** - Now you can toogle light levels with the press of a button
- ✨ **Quality** - You can add shaders to enchance your visual experience
- 💡 **Safety** - A way to see where hostile mobs will spawn
- 🛠️ **Builds** - No creativity? No problem, you can add holograms of builds to guide you
- 📊 **Management** - Now you have a menu to setup all your mods in the same place
- 🎒 **Convenience** - You can now see what your shulker have, on your inventory
- 🔎 **Zooming** - A better way to zoom long distances
## Dependencies
All the required dependencies for the mods to work are already pre-installed so that you don't need to worry. It's just that simple, run and play !!! 😎
## Recourse Packs
- **(Bee's) Fancy Crops** - This package makes farming prettier
- **Better Lanterns** - This package adds 3D shapes to lanterns
- **Dark-GUI** - This package changes the standart white UI for a dark one
- **Dramatic Skys** - This package gives extra life to the skys, including sun and moon
- **Low On Fre** - This package reduces the size of the burning effect
- **Motschen's Better Leaves** - This package adds detailed shapes to leaves
- **Translations for Sodium** - This package adds translations for the Sodium Mod
## Shader Packs
- **AstraLex Shaders**
- **Bliss Shaders**
- **Complementary Shaders - Reimagined**
- **Complementary Shaders - Unbound**
- **Photon Shaders**
- **Solas Shader**
### WARNING
- There's a small amount of shaders that may conflict with the Dramatic Skys Recourse Pack, if that happend just unselect the recourse pack in the Recourse Pack Menu.🤙
